description: Create an Azure IoT architecture diagram for a Smart City telemetry pipeline based on the requirements in '~/Desktop/iot_requirements.txt'. Using the Azure shape library, model a flow originating from Devices to Azure IoT Hub, then to Azure Stream Analytics. The pipeline must split into a cold path to Azure Data Lake Storage and a hot path to Azure Cosmos DB, which then connects to Power BI. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/smart_city_iot.drawio' and export a PNG image to '~/Desktop/smart_city_iot.png'.
